content: i wanna ramble a bit now cause i don't like the new railroad explorations that are in stars ch1
well
It does speed up stage clear quite a lot
just about anything outside of combat itself (apart from gutting counter damage bonus)
im not sure if you guys remember this part of the game but around the end of chapter 2
you have a portion of a stage where you literally play as brown
sneaking around finding dead ends before eventually finding that guy who i think dies i forgot his name
that was really fun to at least roleplay
and then there was the jenkins pov
i'm sure this one is at least remembered
i dunno, comparing those to what we have now feels
Maybe exploration will be back in ch2 of arc 2
I like having the option to skip stuff
a bit depressing, ngl, feels like the game is further away with how less immersive it is
yeah but you're not gonna go through story stages twice @@
unless if it's for an achievement
